title: De-slop the Halden exec-summary paragraph
guidance: Reward prose that reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it, with every fact preserved. Penalise residual AI tells or any changed figure.

parts.label: Rewrite
parts.note: one paragraph, same shape as source

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite the text below so it reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it for a PE audience. Keep every fact.
runner_input.constraints: Output: the rewritten text in the same shape as the source (one paragraph).

source_blocks.text: It's worth noting that Halden represents a truly remarkable tapestry of opportunity in the ever-evolving landscape of food-safety compliance. This isn't just a software business — it's an institutionally-bestowed moat. As we delve into the numbers, the £11.2m ARR and 112% NRR quietly underscore a fundamentally robust foundation. Despite its challenges, the company stands as a testament to durable demand. In conclusion, the opportunity is clear.

rubric_notes: £11.2m ARR and 112% NRR must survive; cut tapestry/landscape/delve/quietly/testament/'this isn't X — it's Y'/'Despite its challenges'/'In conclusion'.
